channel.title: vinta/awesome-python Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:
Task Queues

  • dramatiqstars2.6k - A fast and reliable background task processing library for Python 3.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
WSGI Servers

  • gunicornstars7.6k - Pre-forked, ported from Ruby's Unicorn project.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021
item.description:
Database Drivers

  • SQlite - awesome-sqlitestars120
    • sqlite3 - (Python standard library) SQlite interface compliant with DB-API 2.0
    • SuperSQLitestars669 - A supercharged SQLite library built on top of apswstars460.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Books

  • Think Python

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Enterprise Application Integrations

  • Zato - ESB, SOA, REST, APIs and Cloud Integrations in Python.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Functional Programming

  • returnsstars1.7k - A set of type-safe monads, transformers, and composition utilities.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Compatibility

  • modernizestars252 - Modernizes Python code for eventual Python 3 migration.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2020
item.description:
Task Queues

  • celery - An asynchronous task queue/job queue based on distributed message passing.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • gymstars24.1k - A toolkit for developing and comparing reinforcement learning algorithms.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Shell

  • xonshstars4.7k - A Python-powered, cross-platform, Unix-gazing shell language and command prompt.

    • GraphQL

  • graphenestars6.6k - GraphQL framework for Python.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • magentastars16.6k - A tool to generate music and art using artificial intelligence.

    • Machine Learning

  • MindsDBstars3.7k - MindsDB is an open source AI layer for existing databases that allows you to effortlessly develop, train and deploy state-of-the-art machine learning models using standard queries.

    • Computer Vision

  • Face Recognitionstars39.9k - Simple facial recognition library.

    • Image Processing

  • python-barcodestars251 - Create barcodes in Python with no extra dependencies.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020
item.description:
Science

  • SimPy - A process-based discrete-event simulation framework.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Static Site Generator

  • makesitestars1.5k - Simple, lightweight, and magic-free static site/blog generator (< 130 lines).

    • Penetration Testing

  • setoolkitstars6.5k - A toolkit for social engineering.
  • sqlmapstars20k - Automatic SQL injection and database takeover tool.
  • fsocietystars6.7k - A Penetration testing framework.

    • Image Processing

  • pywalstars5.2k - A tool that generates color schemes from images.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2020
item.description:
GUI Development

  • DearPyGuistars5.1k - A Simple GPU accelerated Python GUI framework

    • Job Scheduler

  • Prefectstars6.3k - A modern workflow orchestration framework that makes it easy to build, schedule and monitor robust data pipelines.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Admin Panels

  • jet-bridgestars940 - Admin panel framework for any application with nice UI (ex Jet Django)

    • ASGI Servers

  • uvicornstars3.9k - A lightning-fast ASGI server implementation, using uvloop and httptools.

    • Asynchronous Programming

  • uvloopstars7.7k - Ultra fast asyncio event loop.

    • Built-in Classes Enhancement

  • dataclasses - (Python standard library) Data classes.

    • CMS

  • wagtail - A Django content management system.

    • Computer Vision

  • OpenCV - Open Source Computer Vision Library.
  • tesserocrstars1.4k - Another simple, Pillow-friendly, wrapper around the tesseract-ocr API for OCR.

    • Concurrency and Parallelism

  • multiprocessing - (Python standard library) Process-based parallelism.
  • uvloopstars7.7k - Ultra fast implementation of asyncio event loop on top of libuv.

    • Configuration

  • hydrastars4.2k - Hydra is a framework for elegantly configuring complex applications.

    • Data Analysis

  • AWS Data Wranglerstars1.7k - Pandas on AWS.
  • Optimusstars1k - Agile Data Science Workflows made easy with PySpark.

    • Data Visualization

  • plotninestars2.7k - A grammar of graphics for Python based on ggplot2.

    • Date and Time

  • mayastars3.3k - Datetimes for Humans.

    • Distribution

  • pyarmorstars935 - A tool used to obfuscate python scripts, bind obfuscated scripts to fixed machine or expire obfuscated scripts.

    • Downloader

  • aksharestars3.5k - A financial data interface library, built for human beings!

    • E-commerce

  • forex-pythonstars396 - Foreign exchange rates, Bitcoin price index and currency conversion.

    • Functional Programming

  • CyToolzstars777 - Cython implementation of Toolz: High performance functional utilities.

    • GraphQL

  • tartiflette - SDL-first GraphQL engine implementation for Python 3.6+ and asyncio.

    • Game Development

  • Arcade - Arcade is a modern Python framework for crafting games with compelling graphics and sound.

    • Implementations

  • CLPythonstars317 - Implementation of the Python programming language written in Common Lisp.

    • Job Scheduler

  • Airflow - Airflow is a platform to programmatically author, schedule and monitor workflows.

    • Logging

  • logging - (Python standard library) Logging facility for Python.

    • Package Management

  • poetrystars15k - Python dependency management and packaging made easy.

    • Package Repositories

  • warehousestars2.7k - Next generation Python Package Repository (PyPI).

    • RPC Servers

  • zeroRPCstars2.8k - zerorpc is a flexible RPC implementation based on ZeroMQ and MessagePack.

    • Science

  • Open Babel - A chemical toolbox designed to speak the many languages of chemical data.

    • Search

  • elasticsearch-dsl-pystars3.2k - The official high-level Python client for Elasticsearch.
  • elasticsearch-py - The official low-level Python client for Elasticsearch.

    • Static Site Generator

  • mkdocsstars12.1k - Markdown friendly documentation generator.
  • pelicanstars10.4k - Static site generator that supports Markdown and reST syntax.

    • Template Engine

  • Jinja2stars7.7k - A modern and designer friendly templating language.

    • Video

  • vidgearstars1.8k - Most Powerful multi-threaded Video Processing framework.

    • Web Crawling

  • portiastars8.2k - Visual scraping for Scrapy.

    • Newsletters

  • Python Weekly

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2020
item.description:
Logging

  • structlog - Structured logging made easy.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2020
item.description:
Data Visualization

  • Cartopystars869 - A cartographic python library with matplotlib support

    • Logging

  • logbook - Logging replacement for Python.
  • sentry-pythonstars920 - Sentry SDK for Python.

    • Computer Vision

  • EasyOCRstars11.4k - Ready-to-use OCR with 40+ languages supported.
  • Korniastars4k - Open Source Differentiable Computer Vision Library for PyTorch.
  • pytesseractstars3.6k - A wrapper for Google Tesseract OCR.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2020
item.description:
Asynchronous Programming

  • triostars3.9k - A friendly library for async concurrency and I/O.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jun 22nd - Jun 28th, 2020
item.description:
Image Processing

  • PyMattingstars897 - A library for alpha matting.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
GUI Development

  • pygletstars794 - A cross-platform windowing and multimedia library for Python.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
DevOps Tools

  • Configuration Management
    • ansiblestars48.1k - A radically simple IT automation platform.
    • cloudinit - A multi-distribution package that handles early initialization of a cloud instance.
    • OpenStack - Open source software for building private and public clouds.
    • pyinfrastars1.2k - A versatile CLI tools and python libraries to automate infrastructure.
    • saltstackstars11.7k - Infrastructure automation and management system.
  • SSH-style Deployment
    • cuisinestars1.2k - Chef-like functionality for Fabric.
    • fabricstars12.8k - A simple, Pythonic tool for remote execution and deployment.
    • fabtoolsstars1.2k - Tools for writing awesome Fabric files.
  • Process Management
    • honchostars1.4k - A Python clone of Foremanstars5.5k, for managing Procfile-based applications.
    • supervisorstars6.8k - Supervisor process control system for UNIX.
  • Monitoring
    • psutilstars7.3k - A cross-platform process and system utilities module.
  • Backup
    • BorgBackup - A deduplicating archiver with compression and encryption.
  • Others
    • docker-compose - Fast, isolated development environments using Docker.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Podcasts

  • Django Chat
  • Running in Production
  • Podcast.__init__

    • Books

  • Fluent Python

    • Websites

  • Tutorials
    • Full Stack Python
    • Python Cheatsheet
    • Real Python
    • The Hitchhiker’s Guide to Python
    • Ultimate Python study guidestars2.9k
  • Libraries
    • Awesome Python @LibHunt
  • Others
    • Python ZEEF
    • Pythonic News
    • What the f*ck Python!stars26.6k

    • Newsletters

  • Awesome Python Newsletter

    • ASGI Servers

  • daphnestars1.5k - A HTTP, HTTP2 and WebSocket protocol server for ASGI and ASGI-HTTP.

    • Algorithms and Design Patterns

  • Algorithms
    • algorithmsstars19.1k - Minimal examples of data structures and algorithms.
    • python-dsstars1.4k - A collection of data structure and algorithms for coding interviews.
    • sortedcontainersstars2.2k - Fast and pure-Python implementation of sorted collections.
    • TheAlgorithmsstars106.3k - All Algorithms implemented in Python.
  • Design Patterns
    • PyPattyrnstars1.2k - A simple yet effective library for implementing common design patterns.
    • python-patternsstars28.3k - A collection of design patterns in Python.
    • transitionsstars3.7k - A lightweight, object-oriented finite state machine implementation.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
Functional Programming

  • Coconutstars3.2k - A variant of Python built for simple, elegant, Pythonic functional programming.
  • more-itertoolsstars1.9k - More routines for operating on iterables, beyond itertools.

    • RPC Servers

  • RPyCstars997 (Remote Python Call) - A transparent and symmetric RPC library for Python

    • Computer Vision

  • SimpleCVstars2.5k - An open source framework for building computer vision applications.

    • CMS

  • indicostars1.2k - A feature-rich event management system, made @ CERN.

    • Distribution

  • shivstars1.2k - A command line utility for building fully self-contained zipapps (PEP 441), but with all their dependencies included.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Mar 30th - Apr 5th, 2020
item.description:
Podcasts

  • The Real Python Podcast

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Configuration

  • profig - Config from multiple formats with value conversion.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Implementations

  • PyPy - A very fast and compliant implementation of the Python language.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
Data Visualization

  • diagramsstars13.4k - Diagram as Code.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 27th - Feb 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Date and Time

  • Arrow - A Python library that offers a sensible and human-friendly approach to creating, manipulating, formatting and converting dates, times and timestamps.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 20th - Jan 26th, 2020
item.description:
Science

  • Karate Clubstars1.2k - Unsupervised machine learning toolbox for graph structured data.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
HTTP Clients

  • httpxstars6.8k - A next generation HTTP client for Python.
  • grequestsstars3.7k - requests + gevent for asynchronous HTTP requests.
  • requestsstars45.2k - HTTP Requests for Humans.

    • Logging

  • logurustars8.8k - Library which aims to bring enjoyable logging in Python.

    • Email

  • Mail Servers
    • modoboastars1.8k - A mail hosting and management platform including a modern Web UI.
    • salmonstars482 - A Python Mail Server.
  • Clients
    • imboxstars984 - Python IMAP for Humans.
    • yagmailstars2k - Yet another Gmail/SMTP client.
  • Others
    • flankerstars1.5k - An email address and Mime parsing library.
    • mailerstars224 - High-performance extensible mail delivery framework.

    • Web Content Extracting

  • requests-htmlstars11.9k - Pythonic HTML Parsing for Humans.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Dec 16th - Dec 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Package Management

  • pip - The package installer for Python.
    • pip-toolsstars4.9k - A set of tools to keep your pinned Python dependencies fresh.
    • PyPI

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Nov 18th - Nov 24th, 2019
item.description:
Refactoring

  • Bicycle Repair Man - Bicycle Repair Man, a refactoring tool for Python.
  • Bowler - Safe code refactoring for modern Python.
  • Ropestars1.1k - Rope is a python refactoring library.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Nov 4th - Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
GraphQL

  • tartiflette-aiohttpstars52 - An aiohttp-based wrapper for Tartiflette to expose GraphQL APIs over HTTP.
  • tartiflette-asgistars85 - ASGI support for the Tartiflette GraphQL engine.

    • Asynchronous Programming

  • asyncio - (Python standard library) Asynchronous I/O, event loop, coroutines and tasks.
    • awesome-asynciostars3k
  • Twisted - An event-driven networking engine.

    • Network Virtualization

  • poxstars532 - A Python-based SDN control applications, such as OpenFlow SDN controllers.

    • Processes

  • delegator.pystars1.5k - Subprocesses for Humans 2.0.

    • Task Queues

  • hueystars3.5k - Little multi-threaded task queue.
  • mrqstars840 - A distributed worker task queue in Python using Redis & gevent.
  • rqstars7.7k - Simple job queues for Python.

    • WebSocket

  • channelsstars4.9k - Developer-friendly asynchrony for Django.
  • websocketsstars3.3k - A library for building WebSocket servers and clients with a focus on correctness and simplicity.

    • WSGI Servers

  • bjoernstars2.6k - Asynchronous, very fast and written in C.
  • uWSGI - A project aims at developing a full stack for building hosting services, written in C.
  • waitressstars929 - Multi-threaded, powers Pyramid.
  • werkzeugstars5.7k - A WSGI utility library for Python that powers Flask and can easily be embedded into your own projects.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Oct 28th - Nov 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Serialization

  • ultrajsonstars3.2k - A fast JSON decoder and encoder written in C with Python bindings.

    • Web Frameworks

  • Synchronous
    • Django - The most popular web framework in Python.
      • awesome-djangostars625
      • awesome-djangostars3.9k
    • Flask - A microframework for Python.
      • awesome-flaskstars9.9k
    • Pyramid - A small, fast, down-to-earth, open source Python web framework.
      • awesome-pyramidstars507
    • Masonitestars1.6k - The modern and developer centric Python web framework.
  • Asynchronous
    • Tornado - A web framework and asynchronous networking library.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
GUI Development

  • enamlstars1k - Creating beautiful user-interfaces with Declarative Syntax like QML.

    • News Feed

  • Stream Frameworkstars4.5k - Building news feed and notification systems using Cassandra and Redis.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 30th - Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Microsoft Windows

  • PyWin32stars3k - Python Extensions for Windows.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 16th - Sep 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Image Processing

  • pyvipsstars317 - A fast image processing library with low memory needs.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 9th - Sep 15th, 2019
item.description:
Code Analysis

  • Static Type Checkers, also see awesome-python-typingstars790
    • mypy - Check variable types during compile time.
    • pyre-checkstars5.3k - Performant type checking.
    • typeshedstars2.1k - Collection of library stubs for Python, with static types.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 26th - Sep 1st, 2019
item.description:
Date and Time

  • PyTimestars140 - An easy-to-use Python module which aims to operate date/time/datetime by string.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python May 27th - Jun 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Data Visualization

  • Dash - Built on top of Flask, React and Plotly aimed at analytical web applications.
    • awesome-dashstars1.1k

item.title: vinta/awesome-python May 20th - May 26th, 2019
item.description:
Code Analysis

  • Code Formatters
    • blackstars20.9k - The uncompromising Python code formatter.
    • isortstars3.9k - A Python utility / library to sort imports.
    • yapfstars11.7k - Yet another Python code formatter from Google.

    • Admin Panels

  • django-grappelli - A jazzy skin for the Django Admin-Interface.
  • django-jetstars3.1k - Modern responsive template for the Django admin interface with improved functionality.
  • django-suit - Alternative Django Admin-Interface (free only for Non-commercial use).

    • Job Scheduler

  • Joblib - A set of tools to provide lightweight pipelining in Python.

    • Science

  • Colour - Implementing a comprehensive number of colour theory transformations and algorithms.

    • URL Manipulation

  • webargsstars1.2k - A friendly library for parsing HTTP request arguments with built-in support for popular web frameworks.

    • Cryptography

  • paramikostars7k - The leading native Python SSHv2 protocol library.

    • E-commerce

  • moneystars196 - Money class with optional CLDR-backed locale-aware formatting and an extensible currency exchange.

    • GUI Development

  • Eelstars4.3k - A library for making simple Electron-like offline HTML/JS GUI apps.
  • PyQt - Python bindings for the Qt cross-platform application and UI framework.
  • PySimpleGUIstars6.2k - Wrapper for tkinter, Qt, WxPython and Remi.
  • pywebviewstars2.4k - A lightweight cross-platform native wrapper around a webview component.

    • Game Development

  • Cocos2d - cocos2d is a framework for building 2D games, demos, and other graphical/interactive applications.
  • Harfang3D - Python framework for 3D, VR and game development.
  • Panda3D - 3D game engine developed by Disney.

    • Geolocation

  • django-countriesstars980 - A Django app that provides a country field for models and forms.

    • Implementations

  • Cython - Optimizing Static Compiler for Python.
  • IronPythonstars1.4k - Implementation of the Python programming language written in C#.
  • Jython - Implementation of Python programming language written in Java for the JVM.
  • MicroPythonstars12.5k - A lean and efficient Python programming language implementation.
  • PeachPystars1.5k - x86-64 assembler embedded in Python.
  • Pystonstars5k - A Python implementation using JIT techniques.
  • Stackless Pythonstars707 - An enhanced version of the Python programming language.

    • Caching

  • HermesCache - Python caching library with tag-based invalidation and dogpile effect prevention.

    • Compatibility

  • six - Python 2 and 3 compatibility utilities.

    • Data Visualization

  • PyGraphviz - Python interface to Graphviz.

    • Foreign Function Interface

  • cffi - Foreign Function Interface for Python calling C code.

    • HTML Manipulation

  • cssutils - A CSS library for Python.

    • Environment Management

  • virtualenvstars3.9k - A tool to create isolated Python environments.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Apr 1st - Apr 7th, 2019
item.description:
Forms

  • django-bootstrap4stars903 - Bootstrap 4 integration with Django.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Mar 18th - Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
Package Repositories

  • bandersnatchstars233 - PyPI mirroring tool provided by Python Packaging Authority (PyPA).

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Web Crawling

  • feedparser - Universal feed parser.
  • grabstars2.1k - Site scraping framework.
  • MechanicalSoupstars3.7k - A Python library for automating interaction with websites.
  • robobrowserstars3.5k - A simple, Pythonic library for browsing the web without a standalone web browser.
  • scrapy - A fast high-level screen scraping and web crawling framework.

    • WebSocket

  • autobahn-pythonstars2.3k - WebSocket & WAMP for Python on Twisted and asyncio.

    • Caching

  • beakerstars469 - A WSGI middleware for sessions and caching.
  • pylibmcstars442 - A Python wrapper around the libmemcached interface.
  • python-diskcache - SQLite and file backed cache backend with faster lookups than memcached and redis.

    • ChatOps Tools

  • errbotstars2.5k - The easiest and most popular chatbot to implement ChatOps.

    • Debugging Tools

  • Tracing
    • lptracestars671 - strace for Python programs.
    • manholestars311 - Debugging UNIX socket connections and present the stacktraces for all threads and an interactive prompt.
    • pyringestars1.6k - Debugger capable of attaching to and injecting code into Python processes.
    • python-hunterstars616 - A flexible code tracing toolkit.

    • Deep Learning

  • caffestars31.6k - A fast open framework for deep learning..
  • kerasstars51.1k - A high-level neural networks library and capable of running on top of either TensorFlow or Theano.
  • mxnetstars19.4k - A deep learning framework designed for both efficiency and flexibility.
  • pytorchstars48.1k - Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration.
  • SerpentAIstars5.9k - Game agent framework. Use any video game as a deep learning sandbox.
  • tensorflowstars155.7k - The most popular Deep Learning framework created by Google.

    • Documentation

  • sphinxstars3.9k - Python Documentation generator.
    • awesome-sphinxdocstars725
  • pdocstars899 - Epydoc replacement to auto generate API documentation for Python libraries.
  • pyccostars742 - The literate-programming-style documentation generator.

    • Downloader

  • you-get - A YouTube/Youku/Niconico video downloader written in Python 3.
  • youtube-dl - A small command-line program to download videos from YouTube.

    • GUI Development

  • Gooeystars11.3k - Turn command line programs into a full GUI application with one line.

    • Miscellaneous

  • boltonsstars5.5k - A set of pure-Python utilities.
  • tryton - A general purpose business framework.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • General
    • gensimstars12k - Topic Modeling for Humans.
    • langid.pystars1.8k - Stand-alone language identification system.
    • nltk - A leading platform for building Python programs to work with human language data.
    • patternstars7.9k - A web mining module.
    • polyglotstars1.8k - Natural language pipeline supporting hundreds of languages.
    • pytextstars6.2k - A natural language modeling framework based on PyTorch.
    • PyTorch-NLPstars1.9k - A toolkit enabling rapid deep learning NLP prototyping for research.
    • spacy - A library for industrial-strength natural language processing in Python and Cython.
    • Stanzastars5.4k - The Stanford NLP Group's official Python library, supporting 60+ languages.
  • Chinese
    • funNLPstars30.7k - A collection of tools and datasets for Chinese NLP.
    • jiebastars26.2k - The most popular Chinese text segmentation library.
    • pkuseg-pythonstars5.4k - A toolkit for Chinese word segmentation in various domains.
    • snownlpstars5.4k - A library for processing Chinese text.

    • Network Virtualization

  • mininetstars3.9k - A popular network emulator and API written in Python.
  • napalmstars1.7k - Cross-vendor API to manipulate network devices.

    • Package Repositories

  • devpistars454 - PyPI server and packaging/testing/release tool.

    • Processes

  • sarge - Yet another wrapper for subprocess.

    • Recommender Systems

  • lightfmstars3.6k - A Python implementation of a number of popular recommendation algorithms.
  • spotlightstars2.5k - Deep recommender models using PyTorch.
  • Surprisestars4.8k - A scikit for building and analyzing recommender systems.
  • tensorrecstars1.1k - A Recommendation Engine Framework in TensorFlow.

    • Search

  • django-haystackstars3.2k - Modular search for Django.
  • pysolrstars588 - A lightweight Python wrapper for Apache Solr.
  • whoosh - A fast, pure Python search engine library.

    • Static Site Generator

  • lektorstars3.4k - An easy to use static CMS and blog engine.
  • nikolastars2.1k - A static website and blog generator.

    • Tagging

  • django-taggitstars2.6k - Simple tagging for Django.

    • Template Engine

  • Genshi - Python templating toolkit for generation of web-aware output.

    • Text Processing

  • Unique identifiers
    • hashidsstars1.2k - Implementation of hashids in Python.
    • shortuuidstars1.5k - A generator library for concise, unambiguous and URL-safe UUIDs.

    • Video

  • moviepy - A module for script-based movie editing with many formats, including animated GIFs.

    • Authentication

  • JWT
    • pyjwtstars3.8k - JSON Web Token implementation in Python.
    • python-josestars843 - A JOSE implementation in Python.
    • python-jwtstars186 - A module for generating and verifying JSON Web Tokens.

    • Admin Panels

  • ajentistars6.4k - The admin panel your servers deserve.
  • wooeystars1.6k - A Django app which creates automatic web UIs for Python scripts.

    • Build Tools

  • pybuilderstars1.3k - A continuous build tool written in pure Python.

    • Built-in Classes Enhancement

  • DottedDictstars121 - A library that provides a method of accessing lists and dicts with a dotted path notation.

    • CMS

  • feincmsstars798 - One of the most advanced Content Management Systems built on Django.
  • mezzaninestars4.3k - A powerful, consistent, and flexible content management platform.
  • plone - A CMS built on top of the open source application server Zope.
  • quokkastars2.2k - Flexible, extensible, small CMS powered by Flask and MongoDB.
  • Kottistars361 - A high-level, Pythonic web application framework built on Pyramid.

    • Command-line Tools

  • CLI Enhancements
    • httpiestars4 - A command line HTTP client, a user-friendly cURL replacement.
    • iredisstars1.5k - Redis CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
    • kube-shellstars1.9k - An integrated shell for working with the Kubernetes CLI.
    • liteclistars1.4k - SQLite CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
    • myclistars9.6k - MySQL CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
    • pgclistars9.6k - PostgreSQL CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
    • sawsstars4.8k - A Supercharged aws-clistars11k.

    • Compatibility

  • python-future - The missing compatibility layer between Python 2 and Python 3.

    • Concurrency and Parallelism

  • concurrent.futures - (Python standard library) A high-level interface for asynchronously executing callables.
  • scoopstars500 - Scalable Concurrent Operations in Python.

    • Configuration

  • configobjstars257 - INI file parser with validation.
  • configparser - (Python standard library) INI file parser.

    • Cryptography

  • passlib - Secure password storage/hashing library, very high level.
  • pynaclstars774 - Python binding to the Networking and Cryptography (NaCl) library.

    • Database

  • pickleDBstars561 - A simple and lightweight key-value store for Python.
  • tinydbstars4.2k - A tiny, document-oriented database.
  • ZODBstars460 - A native object database for Python. A key-value and object graph database.

    • Code Analysis

  • Code Linters
    • flake8 - A wrapper around pycodestyle, pyflakes and McCabe.
      • awesome-flake8-extensionsstars564
    • pylamastars773 - A code audit tool for Python and JavaScript.
    • pylint - A fully customizable source code analyzer.
    • wemake-python-styleguidestars1.5k - The strictest and most opinionated python linter ever.

    • Distributed Computing

  • Batch Processing
    • daskstars8.3k - A flexible parallel computing library for analytic computing.
    • luigistars14.5k - A module that helps you build complex pipelines of batch jobs.
    • mrjobstars2.5k - Run MapReduce jobs on Hadoop or Amazon Web Services.
    • PySpark - Apache Spark Python API.
    • Raystars15.9k - A system for parallel and distributed Python that unifies the machine learning ecosystem.
  • Stream Processing
    • fauststars5.5k - A stream processing library, porting the ideas from Kafka Streams to Python.
    • streamparsestars1.4k - Run Python code against real-time streams of data via Apache Storm.

    • Serialization

  • python-rapidjsonstars419 - A Python wrapper around RapidJSONstars10.8k.
  • pysimdjsonstars448 - A Python bindings for simdjsonstars13.3k.
  • marshmallowstars5.5k - A lightweight library for converting complex objects to and from simple Python datatypes.

    • Audio

  • Audio
    • audioreadstars362 - Cross-library (GStreamer + Core Audio + MAD + FFmpeg) audio decoding.
    • dejavustars5.4k - Audio fingerprinting and recognition.
    • kaprestars738 - Keras Audio Preprocessors
    • librosastars4.5k - Python library for audio and music analysis
    • matcheringstars412 - A library for automated reference audio mastering.
    • mingus - An advanced music theory and notation package with MIDI file and playback support.
    • pyAudioAnalysisstars3.9k - Audio feature extraction, classification, segmentation and applications.
    • pydubstars5.3k - Manipulate audio with a simple and easy high level interface.
    • TimeSidestars301 - Open web audio processing framework.
  • Metadata
    • beetsstars10.1k - A music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger.
    • eyeD3stars301 - A tool for working with audio files, specifically MP3 files containing ID3 metadata.
    • mutagenstars776 - A Python module to handle audio metadata.
    • tinytagstars454 - A library for reading music meta data of MP3, OGG, FLAC and Wave files.

    • Web Asset Management

  • django-compressorstars2.5k - Compresses linked and inline JavaScript or CSS into a single cached file.
  • django-pipelinestars1.4k - An asset packaging library for Django.
  • django-storagesstars1.9k - A collection of custom storage back ends for Django.
  • fanstatic - Packages, optimizes, and serves static file dependencies as Python packages.
  • fileconveyor - A daemon to detect and sync files to CDNs, S3 and FTP.
  • flask-assetsstars410 - Helps you integrate webassets into your Flask app.
  • webassetsstars894 - Bundles, optimizes, and manages unique cache-busting URLs for static resources.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Dec 24th - Dec 30th, 2018
item.description:
Game Development

  • PySDL2 - A ctypes based wrapper for the SDL2 library.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Podcasts

  • Test and Code

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
Robotics

  • PythonRoboticsstars12.2k - This is a compilation of various robotics algorithms with visualizations.
  • rospy - This is a library for ROS (Robot Operating System).

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 6th - Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
Files

  • pathlib - (Python standard library) An cross-platform, object-oriented path library.
  • PyFilesystem2stars1.3k - Python's filesystem abstraction layer.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 30th - Aug 5th, 2018
item.description:
Database Drivers

  • Asynchronous Clients
    • motorstars1.7k - The async Python driver for MongoDB.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 23rd - Jul 29th, 2018
item.description:
Command-line Interface Development

  • Terminal Rendering
    • alive-progressstars2.4k - A new kind of Progress Bar, with real-time throughput, eta and very cool animations.
    • asciimaticsstars2.7k - A package to create full-screen text UIs (from interactive forms to ASCII animations).
    • bashplotlibstars1.5k - Making basic plots in the terminal.
    • colorama - Cross-platform colored terminal text.
    • richstars25.7k - Python library for rich text and beautiful formatting in the terminal. Also provides a great RichHandler log handler.
    • tqdmstars18.3k - Fast, extensible progress bar for loops and CLI.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 2nd - Jul 8th, 2018
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • H2Ostars5.3k - Open Source Fast Scalable Machine Learning Platform.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python May 28th - Jun 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Newsletters

  • Python Tricks

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Apr 30th - May 6th, 2018
item.description:
Science

  • QuTiP - Quantum Toolbox in Python.

    • GUI Development

  • PyGObject - Python Bindings for GLib/GObject/GIO/GTK+ (GTK+3).

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:
Date and Time

  • dateutilstars1.6k - Extensions to the standard Python datetime module.

    • Files

  • mimetypes - (Python standard library) Map filenames to MIME types.
  • path.pystars955 - A module wrapper for os.path.

    • Foreign Function Interface

  • ctypes - (Python standard library) Foreign Function Interface for Python calling C code.

    • GUI Development

  • curses - Built-in wrapper for ncurses used to create terminal GUI applications.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Mar 5th - Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
Web Content Extracting

  • toapistars3.1k - Every web site provides APIs.

    • Implementations

  • Grumpystars10.3k - More compiler than interpreter as more powerful CPython2.7 replacement (alpha).

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 26th - Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
Database Drivers

  • PostgreSQL - awesome-postgresstars7.1k
    • psycopg2 - The most popular PostgreSQL adapter for Python.
    • queriesstars233 - A wrapper of the psycopg2 library for interacting with PostgreSQL.

    • Built-in Classes Enhancement

  • attrsstars3.5k - Replacement for __init__, __eq__, __repr__, etc. boilerplate in class definitions.
  • bidictstars822 - Efficient, Pythonic bidirectional map data structures and related functionality..
  • Boxstars1.7k - Python dictionaries with advanced dot notation access.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 19th - Feb 25th, 2018
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • Metricsstars1.4k - Machine learning evaluation metrics.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 12th - Feb 18th, 2018
item.description:
Podcasts

  • Talk Python To Me

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 5th - Feb 11th, 2018
item.description:
Implementations

  • Numba - Python JIT compiler to LLVM aimed at scientific Python.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 15th - Jan 21st, 2018
item.description:
Code Analysis

  • Static Type Annotations Generators
    • MonkeyTypestars3.4k - A system for Python that generates static type annotations by collecting runtime types.
    • pyannotatestars1.2k - Auto-generate PEP-484 annotations.
    • pytypestars3.3k - Pytype checks and infers types for Python code - without requiring type annotations.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Nov 20th - Nov 26th, 2017
item.description:
E-commerce

  • saleor - An e-commerce storefront for Django.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Oct 2nd - Oct 8th, 2017
item.description:
Data Visualization

  • bqplotstars3.1k - Interactive Plotting Library for the Jupyter Notebook

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 18th - Sep 24th, 2017
item.description:
Hardware

  • keyboardstars2.4k - Hook and simulate global keyboard events on Windows and Linux.
  • mousestars450 - Hook and simulate global mouse events on Windows and Linux.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 4th - Sep 10th, 2017
item.description:
Implementations

  • CPythonstars37.8k - Default, most widely used implementation of the Python programming language written in C.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 14th - Aug 20th, 2017
item.description:
Recommender Systems

  • libffmstars1.5k - A library for Field-aware Factorization Machine (FFM).

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 17th - Jul 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Build Tools

  • PlatformIOstars5.1k - A console tool to build code with different development platforms.

    • CMS

  • django-cms - An Open source enterprise CMS based on the Django.

    • Caching

  • dogpile.cache - dogpile.cache is next generation replacement for Beaker made by same authors.

    • Data Analysis

  • Orange - Data mining, data visualization, analysis and machine learning through visual programming or scripts.

    • Data Validation

  • Cerberusstars2.5k - A lightweight and extensible data validation library.
  • colander - Validating and deserializing data obtained via XML, JSON, an HTML form post.

    • Distribution

  • pynsist - A tool to build Windows installers, installers bundle Python itself.

    • E-commerce

  • shoop - An open source E-Commerce platform based on Django.

    • Environment Management

  • pyenvstars23.3k - Simple Python version management.

    • Forms

  • django-crispy-formsstars4.2k - A Django app which lets you create beautiful forms in a very elegant and DRY way.

    • GUI Development

  • wxPython - A blending of the wxWidgets C++ class library with the Python.

    • HTML Manipulation

  • xmldataset - Simple XML Parsing.

    • Job Scheduler

  • APScheduler - A light but powerful in-process task scheduler that lets you schedule functions.
  • TaskFlow - A Python library that helps to make task execution easy, consistent and reliable.

    • Package Repositories

  • localshopstars371 - Local PyPI server (custom packages and auto-mirroring of pypi).

    • Science

  • ObsPy - A Python toolbox for seismology.
  • SciPy - A Python-based ecosystem of open-source software for mathematics, science, and engineering.

    • Third-party APIs

  • django-wordpressstars320 - WordPress models and views for Django.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python May 22nd - May 28th, 2017
item.description:
Recommender Systems

  • annoystars8.5k - Approximate Nearest Neighbors in C++/Python optimized for memory usage.
  • fastFMstars920 - A library for Factorization Machines.
  • implicitstars2.3k - A fast Python implementation of collaborative filtering for implicit datasets.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Apr 24th - Apr 30th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • Spark ML - Apache Spark's scalable Machine Learning library.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
HTTP Clients

  • httplib2stars407 - Comprehensive HTTP client library.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
URL Manipulation

  • furlstars2k - A small Python library that makes parsing and manipulating URLs easy.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • xgbooststars21k - A scalable, portable, and distributed gradient boosting library.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 9th - Jan 15th, 2017
item.description:
Implementations

  • Pyjionstars1.5k - A JIT for Python based upon CoreCLR.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 2nd - Jan 8th, 2017
item.description:
Debugging Tools

  • pdb-like Debugger
    • ipdbstars1.4k - IPython-enabled pdb.
    • pdb++stars736 - Another drop-in replacement for pdb.
    • pudbstars2k - A full-screen, console-based Python debugger.
    • wdbstars1.5k - An improbable web debugger through WebSockets.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
Third-party APIs

  • boto3stars6.3k - Python interface to Amazon Web Services.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Nov 14th - Nov 20th, 2016
item.description:
Podcasts

  • Python Bytes

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Nov 7th - Nov 13th, 2016
item.description:
Editor Plugins and IDEs

  • Visual Studio Code
    • Python - The official VSCode extension with rich support for Python.
  • Emacs
    • elpystars1.7k - Emacs Python Development Environment.
  • Sublime Text
    • anacondastars2.1k - Anaconda turns your Sublime Text 3 in a full featured Python development IDE.
    • SublimeJEDIstars912 - A Sublime Text plugin to the awesome auto-complete library Jedi.
  • Vim
    • jedi-vimstars4.8k - Vim bindings for the Jedi auto-completion library for Python.
    • python-modestars5.2k - An all in one plugin for turning Vim into a Python IDE.
    • YouCompleteMestars22.8k - Includes Jedistars4.8k-based completion engine for Python.
  • Visual Studio
    • PTVSstars2.3k - Python Tools for Visual Studio.
  • IDE
    • PyCharm - Commercial Python IDE by JetBrains. Has free community edition available.
    • spyderstars6.3k - Open Source Python IDE.

    • Admin Panels

  • django-xadminstars4.6k - Drop-in replacement of Django admin comes with lots of goodies.
  • flask-adminstars4.7k - Simple and extensible administrative interface framework for Flask.
  • flowerstars4.8k - Real-time monitor and web admin for Celery.

    • Authentication

  • OAuth
    • authlibstars2.5k - JavaScript Object Signing and Encryption draft implementation.
    • django-allauthstars6.4k - Authentication app for Django that "just works."
    • django-oauth-toolkitstars2.3k - OAuth 2 goodies for Django.
    • oauthlibstars2.2k - A generic and thorough implementation of the OAuth request-signing logic.
    • python-oauth2stars2.9k - A fully tested, abstract interface to creating OAuth clients and servers.
    • python-social-authstars2.8k - An easy-to-setup social authentication mechanism.

    • Build Tools

  • buildout - A build system for creating, assembling and deploying applications from multiple parts.

    • Caching

  • django-cache-machinestars808 - Automatic caching and invalidation for Django models.
  • django-cacheopsstars1.4k - A slick ORM cache with automatic granular event-driven invalidation.

    • Code Analysis

  • Code Analysis
    • coalastars3.2k - Language independent and easily extendable code analysis application.
    • code2flowstars830 - Turn your Python and JavaScript code into DOT flowcharts.
    • prospectorstars1.4k - A tool to analyse Python code.
    • pycallgraphstars1.5k - A library that visualises the flow (call graph) of your Python application.
    • vulturestars1.6k - A tool for finding and analysing dead Python code.

    • Concurrency and Parallelism

  • eventlet - Asynchronous framework with WSGI support.
  • gevent - A coroutine-based Python networking library that uses greenletstars1.2k.

    • Configuration

  • python-decouplestars1.7k - Strict separation of settings from code.

    • Cryptography

  • cryptography - A package designed to expose cryptographic primitives and recipes to Python developers.

    • Data Analysis

  • Blazestars2.9k - NumPy and Pandas interface to Big Data.
  • Open Miningstars1.1k - Business Intelligence (BI) in Pandas interface.
  • Pandas - A library providing high-performance, easy-to-use data structures and data analysis tools.

    • Data Validation

  • jsonschemastars3.2k - An implementation of JSON Schema for Python.
  • schemastars2.4k - A library for validating Python data structures.
  • Schematicsstars2.4k - Data Structure Validation.
  • valideerstars245 - Lightweight extensible data validation and adaptation library.
  • voluptuousstars1.7k - A Python data validation library.

    • Data Visualization

  • Altairstars6.6k - Declarative statistical visualization library for Python.
  • Bokehstars15.1k - Interactive Web Plotting for Python.
  • Matplotlib - A Python 2D plotting library.
  • Pygal - A Python SVG Charts Creator.
  • PyQtGraph - Interactive and realtime 2D/3D/Image plotting and science/engineering widgets.
  • Seabornstars8.4k - Statistical data visualization using Matplotlib.
  • VisPystars2.6k - High-performance scientific visualization based on OpenGL.

    • Date and Time

  • Pendulumstars4.4k - Python datetimes made easy.
  • pytz - World timezone definitions, modern and historical. Brings the tz database into Python.
  • when.pystars184 - Providing user-friendly functions to help perform common date and time actions.

    • Debugging Tools

  • Profiler
    • line_profilerstars3.5k - Line-by-line profiling.
    • memory_profilerstars62 - Monitor Memory usage of Python code.
    • py-spystars6.9k - A sampling profiler for Python programs. Written in Rust.
    • pyflamestars2.9k - A ptracing profiler For Python.
    • vprofstars3.7k - Visual Python profiler.

    • Deep Learning

  • Theanostars9.4k - A library for fast numerical computation.

    • Distribution

  • dh-virtualenvstars1.4k - Build and distribute a virtualenv as a Debian package.
  • Nuitka - Compile scripts, modules, packages to an executable or extension module.
  • py2app - Freezes Python scripts (Mac OS X).
  • py2exe - Freezes Python scripts (Windows).
  • PyInstallerstars8k - Converts Python programs into stand-alone executables (cross-platform).

    • E-commerce

  • Cartridgestars630 - A shopping cart app built using the Mezzanine.

    • Files

  • python-magicstars1.9k - A Python interface to the libmagic file type identification library.
  • Unipathstars498 - An object-oriented approach to file/directory operations.
  • watchdogstars4.7k - API and shell utilities to monitor file system events.

    • Foreign Function Interface

  • PyCUDA - A Python wrapper for Nvidia's CUDA API.
  • SWIG - Simplified Wrapper and Interface Generator.

    • Forms

  • Deformstars359 - Python HTML form generation library influenced by the formish form generation library.
  • django-bootstrap3stars2.3k - Bootstrap 3 integration with Django.
  • django-remote-formsstars204 - A platform independent Django form serializer.
  • WTFormsstars1.2k - A flexible forms validation and rendering library.

    • Functional Programming

  • fn.pystars3.1k - Functional programming in Python: implementation of missing features to enjoy FP.
  • funcystars2.5k - A fancy and practical functional tools.
  • Toolzstars3.5k - A collection of functional utilities for iterators, functions, and dictionaries.

    • GUI Development

  • Flexxstars2.6k - Flexx is a pure Python toolkit for creating GUI's, that uses web technology for its rendering.
  • kivy - A library for creating NUI applications, running on Windows, Linux, Mac OS X, Android and iOS.
  • Tkinter - Tkinter is Python's de-facto standard GUI package.
  • Togastars2.7k - A Python native, OS native GUI toolkit.
  • urwid - A library for creating terminal GUI applications with strong support for widgets, events, rich colors, etc.

    • Game Development

  • Pygame - Pygame is a set of Python modules designed for writing games.
  • PyOgre - Python bindings for the Ogre 3D render engine, can be used for games, simulations, anything 3D.
  • PyOpenGL - Python ctypes bindings for OpenGL and it's related APIs.
  • RenPy - A Visual Novel engine.

    • Geolocation

  • GeoDjango - A world-class geographic web framework.
  • GeoIPstars218 - Python API for MaxMind GeoIP Legacy Database.
  • geojsonstars619 - Python bindings and utilities for GeoJSON.
  • geopystars3.3k - Python Geocoding Toolbox.

    • HTML Manipulation

  • BeautifulSoup - Providing Pythonic idioms for iterating, searching, and modifying HTML or XML.
  • bleachstars2.1k - A whitelist-based HTML sanitization and text linkification library.
  • MarkupSafestars386 - Implements a XML/HTML/XHTML Markup safe string for Python.
  • WeasyPrint - A visual rendering engine for HTML and CSS that can export to PDF.

    • HTTP Clients

  • treqstars523 - Python requests like API built on top of Twisted's HTTP client.
  • urllib3stars2.7k - A HTTP library with thread-safe connection pooling, file post support, sanity friendly.

    • Hardware

  • ino - Command line toolkit for working with Arduino.
  • Pingo - Pingo provides a uniform API to program devices like the Raspberry Pi, pcDuino, Intel Galileo, etc.
  • PyUserInputstars966 - A module for cross-platform control of the mouse and keyboard.
  • scapystars6.2k - A brilliant packet manipulation library.

    • Image Processing

  • hmapstars184 - Image histogram remapping.
  • imgSeek - A project for searching a collection of images using visual similarity.
  • nude.pystars797 - Nudity detection.
  • paganstars222 - Retro identicon (Avatar) generation based on input string and hash.
  • pillowstars8.5k - Pillow is the friendly PIL fork.
  • pygramstars100 - Instagram-like image filters.
  • python-qrcodestars2.5k - A pure Python QR Code generator.
  • Quadsstars1k - Computer art based on quadtrees.
  • scikit-image - A Python library for (scientific) image processing.
  • thumborstars8.4k - A smart imaging service. It enables on-demand crop, re-sizing and flipping of images.
  • wandstars1.1k - Python bindings for MagickWand, C API for ImageMagick.

    • Interactive Interpreter

  • bpythonstars1.8k - A fancy interface to the Python interpreter.
  • Jupyter Notebook (IPython) - A rich toolkit to help you make the most out of using Python interactively.
    • awesome-jupyterstars2.3k
  • ptpythonstars4.1k - Advanced Python REPL built on top of the python-prompt-toolkitstars7k.

    • Internationalization

  • Babel - An internationalization library for Python.
  • PyICUstars128 - A wrapper of International Components for Unicode C++ library (ICU).

    • Job Scheduler

  • django-schedulestars792 - A calendaring app for Django.
  • doit - A task runner and build tool.
  • gunnerystars731 - Multipurpose task execution tool for distributed systems with web-based interface.
  • Planstars1.1k - Writing crontab file in Python like a charm.
  • schedulestars8.6k - Python job scheduling for humans.
  • Spiffstars970 - A powerful workflow engine implemented in pure Python.

    • Machine Learning

  • NuPICstars6.2k - Numenta Platform for Intelligent Computing.
  • scikit-learn - The most popular Python library for Machine Learning.
  • vowpal_porpoisestars159 - A lightweight Python wrapper for Vowpal Wabbitstars7.5k.

    • Microsoft Windows

  • Python(x,y) - Scientific-applications-oriented Python Distribution based on Qt and Spyder.
  • pythonlibs - Unofficial Windows binaries for Python extension packages.
  • PythonNetstars2.6k - Python Integration with the .NET Common Language Runtime (CLR).
  • WinPython - Portable development environment for Windows 7/8.

    • Miscellaneous

  • blinkerstars1.2k - A fast Python in-process signal/event dispatching system.
  • itsdangerousstars2.2k - Various helpers to pass trusted data to untrusted environments.
  • pluginbasestars949 - A simple but flexible plugin system for Python.

    • News Feed

  • django-activity-streamstars1.9k - Generating generic activity streams from the actions on your site.

    • ORM

  • Relational Databases
    • Django Models - The Django ORM.
    • SQLAlchemy - The Python SQL Toolkit and Object Relational Mapper.
      • awesome-sqlalchemystars2.2k
    • datasetstars4k - Store Python dicts in a database - works with SQLite, MySQL, and PostgreSQL.
    • oratorstars1.3k - The Orator ORM provides a simple yet beautiful ActiveRecord implementation.
    • ormstars1.3k - An async ORM.
    • peeweestars8.3k - A small, expressive ORM.
    • ponystars2.6k - ORM that provides a generator-oriented interface to SQL.
    • pydalstars362 - A pure Python Database Abstraction Layer.
  • NoSQL Databases
    • hot-redisstars271 - Rich Python data types for Redis.
    • mongoenginestars3.5k - A Python Object-Document-Mapper for working with MongoDB.
    • PynamoDBstars1.6k - A Pythonic interface for Amazon DynamoDB.
    • rediscostars433 - A Python Library for Simple Models and Containers Persisted in Redis.

    • Package Management

  • condastars4.1k - Cross-platform, Python-agnostic binary package manager.

    • Permissions

  • django-guardianstars2.9k - Implementation of per object permissions for Django 1.2+
  • django-rulesstars1.3k - A tiny but powerful app providing object-level permissions to Django, without requiring a database.

    • RESTful API

  • Django
    • django-rest-framework - A powerful and flexible toolkit to build web APIs.
    • django-tastypie - Creating delicious APIs for Django apps.
  • Flask
    • evestars6.3k - REST API framework powered by Flask, MongoDB and good intentions.
    • flask-apistars1.2k - Browsable Web APIs for Flask.
    • flask-restfulstars6k - Quickly building REST APIs for Flask.
  • Pyramid
    • cornicestars365 - A RESTful framework for Pyramid.
  • Framework agnostic
    • apistarstars5.6k - A smart Web API framework, designed for Python 3.
    • falconstars8.4k - A high-performance framework for building cloud APIs and web app backends.
    • fastapistars30.8k - A modern, fast, web framework for building APIs with Python 3.6+ based on standard Python type hints.
    • hugstars6.5k - A Python 3 framework for cleanly exposing APIs.
    • sandman2stars1.7k - Automated REST APIs for existing database-driven systems.
    • sanicstars14.9k - A Python 3.6+ web server and web framework that's written to go fast.
    • vibora - Fast, efficient and asynchronous Web framework inspired by Flask.

    • Serverless Frameworks

  • python-lambdastars1.3k - A toolkit for developing and deploying Python code in AWS Lambda.
  • Zappastars11.8k - A tool for deploying WSGI applications on AWS Lambda and API Gateway.

    • Specific Formats Processing

  • General
    • tablibstars3.9k - A module for Tabular Datasets in XLS, CSV, JSON, YAML.
  • Office
    • docxtplstars993 - Editing a docx document by jinja2 template
    • openpyxl - A library for reading and writing Excel 2010 xlsx/xlsm/xltx/xltm files.
    • pyexcelstars917 - Providing one API for reading, manipulating and writing csv, ods, xls, xlsx and xlsm files.
    • python-docxstars2.6k - Reads, queries and modifies Microsoft Word 2007/2008 docx files.
    • python-pptxstars1.3k - Python library for creating and updating PowerPoint (.pptx) files.
    • unoconvstars2.1k - Convert between any document format supported by LibreOffice/OpenOffice.
    • XlsxWriterstars2.5k - A Python module for creating Excel .xlsx files.
    • xlwingsstars2k - A BSD-licensed library that makes it easy to call Python from Excel and vice versa.
    • xlwtstars975 / xlrdstars1.9k - Writing and reading data and formatting information from Excel files.
  • PDF
    • PDFMinerstars4.6k - A tool for extracting information from PDF documents.
    • PyPDF2stars3.6k - A library capable of splitting, merging and transforming PDF pages.
    • ReportLab - Allowing Rapid creation of rich PDF documents.
  • Markdown
    • Mistunestars1.9k - Fastest and full featured pure Python parsers of Markdown.
    • Python-Markdownstars2.5k - A Python implementation of John Gruber’s Markdown.
  • YAML
    • PyYAML - YAML implementations for Python.
  • CSV
    • csvkitstars4.6k - Utilities for converting to and working with CSV.
  • Archive
    • unpstars384 - A command line tool that can unpack archives easily.

    • Template Engine

  • Mako - Hyperfast and lightweight templating for the Python platform.

    • Text Processing

  • General
    • chardetstars1.5k - Python 2/3 compatible character encoding detector.
    • difflib - (Python standard library) Helpers for computing deltas.
    • ftfystars3k - Makes Unicode text less broken and more consistent automagically.
    • fuzzywuzzystars8.1k - Fuzzy String Matching.
    • Levenshteinstars978 - Fast computation of Levenshtein distance and string similarity.
    • pangu.pystars166 - Paranoid text spacing.
    • pyfigletstars807 - An implementation of figlet written in Python.
    • pypinyinstars3.2k - Convert Chinese hanzi (漢字) to pinyin (拼音).
    • textdistancestars2k - Compute distance between sequences with 30+ algorithms.
    • unidecode - ASCII transliterations of Unicode text.
  • Slugify
    • awesome-slugifystars460 - A Python slugify library that can preserve unicode.
    • python-slugifystars1k - A Python slugify library that translates unicode to ASCII.
    • unicode-slugifystars293 - A slugifier that generates unicode slugs with Django as a dependency.
  • Parser
    • plystars1.9k - Implementation of lex and yacc parsing tools for Python.
    • pygments - A generic syntax highlighter.
    • pyparsingstars1.1k - A general purpose framework for generating parsers.
    • python-nameparserstars472 - Parsing human names into their individual components.
    • python-phonenumbersstars2.7k - Parsing, formatting, storing and validating international phone numbers.
    • python-user-agentsstars1.1k - Browser user agent parser.
    • sqlparsestars2.4k - A non-validating SQL parser.

    • URL Manipulation

  • purlstars251 - A simple, immutable URL class with a clean API for interrogation and manipulation.
  • pyshortenersstars297 - A pure Python URL shortening lib.

    • Video

  • scikit-videostars103 - Video processing routines for SciPy.

    • Web Content Extracting

  • html2textstars1.1k - Convert HTML to Markdown-formatted text.
  • lassiestars525 - Web Content Retrieval for Humans.
  • micawberstars536 - A small library for extracting rich content from URLs.
  • newspaperstars11k - News extraction, article extraction and content curation in Python.
  • python-readabilitystars2k - Fast Python port of arc90's readability tool.
  • sumystars2.6k - A module for automatic summarization of text documents and HTML pages.
  • textractstars3k - Extract text from any document, Word, PowerPoint, PDFs, etc.

    • Web Crawling

  • colastars1.4k - A distributed crawling framework.
  • pyspiderstars15k - A powerful spider system.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
Science

  • bcbio-nextgenstars816 - Providing best-practice pipelines for fully automated high throughput sequencing analysis.
  • PyDy - Short for Python Dynamics, used to assist with workflow in the modeling of dynamic motion.
  • Ziplinestars13.9k - A Pythonic algorithmic trading library.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Mar 28th - Apr 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Third-party APIs

  • facebook-sdkstars2.6k - Facebook Platform Python SDK.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Mar 14th - Mar 20th, 2016
item.description:
Testing

  • Test Runners
    • greenstars696 - A clean, colorful test runner.
    • mamba - The definitive testing tool for Python. Born under the banner of BDD.
    • tox - Auto builds and tests distributions in multiple Python versions
  • GUI / Web Testing
    • locuststars16k - Scalable user load testing tool written in Python.
    • PyAutoGUIstars5.1k - PyAutoGUI is a cross-platform GUI automation Python module for human beings.
    • Schemathesisstars838 - A tool for automatic property-based testing of web applications built with Open API / Swagger specifications.
    • Selenium - Python bindings for Selenium WebDriver.
    • sixpackstars1.7k - A language-agnostic A/B Testing framework.
    • splinterstars2.4k - Open source tool for testing web applications.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
Science

  • NIPY - A collection of neuroimaging toolkits.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
E-commerce

  • django-shopstars2.6k - A Django based shop system.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2015
item.description:
Database Drivers

  • MySQL - awesome-mysql
    • mysqlclientstars1.9k - MySQL connector with Python 3 support (mysql-python fork).
    • PyMySQLstars6.4k - A pure Python MySQL driver compatible to mysql-python.
  • Other Relational Databases
    • pymssql - A simple database interface to Microsoft SQL Server.
    • clickhouse-driverstars593 - Python driver with native interface for ClickHouse.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2015
item.description:
Build Tools

  • BitBake - A make-like build tool for embedded Linux.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2015
item.description:
Testing

  • Object Factories
    • factory_boystars2.5k - A test fixtures replacement for Python.
    • mixerstars751 - Another fixtures replacement. Supports Django, Flask, SQLAlchemy, Peewee and etc.
    • model_mommystars929 - Creating random fixtures for testing in Django.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2015
item.description:
Build Tools

  • SCons - A software construction tool.

    • E-commerce

  • alipaystars320 - Unofficial Alipay API for Python.

    • HTML Manipulation

  • html5libstars905 - A standards-compliant library for parsing and serializing HTML documents and fragments.
  • lxml - A very fast, easy-to-use and versatile library for handling HTML and XML.
  • pyquerystars2k - A jQuery-like library for parsing HTML.
  • xmltodictstars4.4k - Working with XML feel like you are working with JSON.

    • Processes

  • shstars5.7k - A full-fledged subprocess replacement for Python.

    • Science

  • astropy - A community Python library for Astronomy.
  • bccbstars501 - Collection of useful code related to biological analysis.
  • Biopython - Biopython is a set of freely available tools for biological computation.
  • cclib - A library for parsing and interpreting the results of computational chemistry packages.
  • NumPy - A fundamental package for scientific computing with Python.
  • PyMCstars5.7k - Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling toolkit.
  • statsmodelsstars6.3k - Statistical modeling and econometrics in Python.
  • SymPystars8.1k - A Python library for symbolic mathematics.

    • Third-party APIs

  • google-api-python-clientstars4.7k - Google APIs Client Library for Python.
  • gspreadstars5.3k - Google Spreadsheets Python API.
  • twythonstars1.8k - A Python wrapper for the Twitter API.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Downloader

  • s4cmdstars1.1k - Super S3 command line tool, good for higher performance.

item.description:
Newsletters

  • Pycoder's Weekly

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 29th - Oct 5th, 2014

E-commerce

  • python-currenciesstars48 - Display money format and its filthy currencies.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 15th - Sep 21st, 2014
item.description:
Date and Time

  • Chronykstars313 - A Python 3 library for parsing human-written times and dates.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Sep 1st - Sep 7th, 2014
item.description:
Science

  • RDKit - Cheminformatics and Machine Learning Software.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 18th - Aug 24th, 2014
item.description:
Date and Time

  • deloreanstars1.7k - A library for clearing up the inconvenient truths that arise dealing with datetimes.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 11th - Aug 17th, 2014
item.description:
E-commerce

  • merchantstars967 - A Django app to accept payments from various payment processors.

    • Testing

  • Code Coverage
    • coverage - Code coverage measurement.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Aug 4th - Aug 10th, 2014
item.description:
Debugging Tools

  • Others
    • django-debug-toolbarstars6.5k - Display various debug information for Django.
    • django-devserverstars1.3k - A drop-in replacement for Django's runserver.
    • flask-debugtoolbarstars800 - A port of the django-debug-toolbar to flask.
    • icecreamstars4.7k - Inspect variables, expressions, and program execution with a single, simple function call.
    • pyelftoolsstars1.2k - Parsing and analyzing ELF files and DWARF debugging information.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 14th - Jul 20th, 2014
item.description:
Downloader

  • s3cmdstars3.6k - A command line tool for managing Amazon S3 and CloudFront.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jul 7th - Jul 13th, 2014
item.description:
E-commerce

  • django-oscar - An open-source e-commerce framework for Django.

    • Command-line Tools

  • Productivity Tools
    • copierstars328 - A library and command-line utility for rendering projects templates.
    • cookiecutterstars14.4k - A command-line utility that creates projects from cookiecutters (project templates).
    • doitlivestars3k - A tool for live presentations in the terminal.
    • howdoistars8.9k - Instant coding answers via the command line.
    • Invokestars3.3k - A tool for managing shell-oriented subprocesses and organizing executable Python code into CLI-invokable tasks.
    • PathPickerstars4.6k - Select files out of bash output.
    • percolstars3k - Adds flavor of interactive selection to the traditional pipe concept on UNIX.
    • thefuckstars61.8k - Correcting your previous console command.
    • tmuxpstars3.1k - A tmuxstars21.3k session manager.
    • trystars588 - A dead simple CLI to try out python packages - it's never been easier.

    • HTML Manipulation

  • untanglestars508 - Converts XML documents to Python objects for easy access.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jun 30th - Jul 6th, 2014
item.description:
Command-line Interface Development

  • Command-line Application Development
    • cement - CLI Application Framework for Python.
    • click - A package for creating beautiful command line interfaces in a composable way.
    • cliff - A framework for creating command-line programs with multi-level commands.
    • docopt - Pythonic command line arguments parser.
    • python-firestars19.1k - A library for creating command line interfaces from absolutely any Python object.
    • python-prompt-toolkitstars7k - A library for building powerful interactive command lines.

    • Database Drivers

  • NoSQL Databases
    • cassandra-driverstars1.2k - The Python Driver for Apache Cassandra.
    • happybasestars562 - A developer-friendly library for Apache HBase.
    • kafka-pythonstars4.4k - The Python client for Apache Kafka.
    • py2neo - A client library and toolkit for working with Neo4j.
    • pymongostars3.3k - The official Python client for MongoDB.
    • redis-pystars9.3k - The Python client for Redis.

item.title: vinta/awesome-python Jun 23rd - Jun 29th, 2014
item.description:
Third-party APIs

  • apache-libcloud - One Python library for all clouds.

    • Date and Time

  • momentstars672 - A Python library for dealing with dates/times. Inspired by Moment.js.

    • Science

  • NetworkX - A high-productivity software for complex networks.

    • Testing

  • Testing Frameworks
    • hypothesisstars5.1k - Hypothesis is an advanced Quickcheck style property based testing library.
    • nose2stars678 - The successor to nose, based on `unittest2.
    • pytest - A mature full-featured Python testing tool.
    • Robot Frameworkstars5.9k - A generic test automation framework.
    • unittest - (Python standard library) Unit testing framework.
  • Mock
    • doublex - Powerful test doubles framework for Python.
    • freezegunstars2.9k - Travel through time by mocking the datetime module.
    • httmockstars425 - A mocking library for requests for Python 2.6+ and 3.2+.
    • httprettystars1.9k - HTTP request mock tool for Python.
    • mock - (Python standard library) A mocking and patching library.
    • mocketstars211 - A socket mock framework with gevent/asyncio/SSL support.
    • responsesstars3.2k - A utility library for mocking out the requests Python library.
    • VCR.pystars2k - Record and replay HTTP interactions on your tests.
  • Fake Data
    • fake2dbstars2.1k - Fake database generator.
    • fakerstars12.5k - A Python package that generates fake data.
    • mimesisstars3.3k - is a Python library that help you generate fake data.
    • radar - Generate random datetime / time.
